description: POLL @ 2026-05-02T11:57:00Z (~12.85h after prior 2026-05-01T23:05:49Z poll — at-cadence). THIRD POST-EOM-CLOSURE POLL — 8 April-EOM PRED windows now d=1.50 past 2026-04-30T23:59Z close; PRED-105 d=14.00 past 2026-04-18 close (TACIT_WITHDRAWAL THRESHOLD HIT — exactly at d=14, ~5min before analyst-noted 12:02Z trigger). NET QUIET on dome public surface — ALL 6 covered page hashes BYTE-IDENTICAL to prior poll: home cb47aab7d62a8380d7f15c35afc0d4db (64,441), wins 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 (91,686), predictions 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785 (152,936), coordinates 5127700325dc0b2bf69a0eea7a94df06 (14,061), model 28cef1a65d65bf6a0a3b0f77458d203d (58,429), evolution 93f99dd70d6d52fbb5616cbc5fec5aa5 (9,638); ai-context still 404 baseline (c1f9838a). 25th consecutive byte-identical predictions.html poll / ~12.4 days. 10 commits since prior poll; HOLD #11 daily-AI-review FIRED at 07:08:24Z (b73722c, 27min EARLIER than predicted 07:35Z) — but registry-update step REMAINS GATED: daily_review.json registry counts unchanged at 69 confirmed / 4 refined / 10 prospective; the ONLY content shifts in b73722c were timestamp fields, eclipse_days 102→101 (auto-decrement), and a single mention of '101 days' in the AI summary string. Composition of 10 commits: 7x 'Auto-update ECM status' (c3b9f56 00:03Z, 5856cf6 03:48Z, ebcced1 05:59Z, 8edf108 07:57Z, 8882aef 09:17Z, 20e5f0a 10:14Z, 6f2b9c6 11:11Z), 2x 'auto: ECM data pull' (9f0ab7d 01:30Z, 82f1f6c 07:17Z), 1x 'auto: daily AI review' (b73722c 07:08Z — HOLD #11 ENDED). 0 manual commits — manual-commit drought now 15.00d / 359.91h (FIRST 15d+ READING ON THE PUBLIC RECORD; 15d threshold breached at 12:02:38Z TODAY ~5min from poll time). 27 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 26); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. 0 source-file touches across 10 new commits: monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed (all SHAs identical to prior 5+ polls). ai_manifest.json byte-identical 405d5c9371aa8ad32f040528e1731eb1/14880, V51.1, last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged; api/index.json e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6 last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged. Live status_history.json now 519 entries (was 512 at prior poll; +7 from 7 Auto-update appends); latest entry 2026-05-02T11:11:02Z, eclipse_days=101 (decremented from 102 at midnight as predicted), wins_confirmed=67 (long-standing 67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged), version V51.0 (auto-pipeline internal counter; prior poll noted same). STEP 10b SILENT-IGNORE WATCH (9 PREDs in window): PRED-105 (46° copper coil cucumber growth) NOW d=14.00 past 2026-04-18 close — TACIT_WITHDRAWAL THRESHOLD HIT EXACTLY at this poll (d=14 hits 2026-05-02T12:02:38Z, poll executed at 11:57:00Z, ~5min away — analyst should advance verdict from silent_ignore to tacit_withdrawal at next post-12:02Z run); 25th consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry; 'Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)' + 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' status unchanged. PRED-077 (M2 Honolulu, our_verdict=standard_physics), PRED-081 (JWST z<0.1 SNe, std-phys), PRED-085 (S-wave shadow zone, std-phys), PRED-087 (Geoid low stationary, std-phys), PRED-088 (Second geoid low, std-phys), PRED-090 (NH TOA flux, recycled), PRED-106 (16 Hz Ca²⁺ ICR, our_verdict=PENDING), PRED-111 (Mascon 30°S 60°E, std-phys) — all 8 still d=1.50 past close; predictions.html byte-identical confirms ZERO post-closure adjudication on any of the 8 across 3 consecutive polls / ~37h post-close; no new WIN entries reference any of them; no commit messages in 10 post-prior-poll commits mention any PRED-NNN; all 9 still labeled PENDING — PROSPECTIVE in predictions.html grep-context check; SEVERITY LOW per Step 10b day-1-3 rule continues for the 7 settled-verdict EOM PREDs and PRED-106 (only PRED-106 has verdict=pending, but its claim is hard-to-falsify Ca²⁺ ICR signaling that the dome was unlikely to claim closure on this fast). Parameters baseline-clean: model.html shows disc_radius 20,015 km, firmament_height 8537 km, decay constant 8619 km, sun_altitude 5733 km, moon_altitude 2534 km, refraction coefficient 0.20 (no shift back to 0.27; n(r) = 1 + 0.20 × (8537 / H(r) − 1) formula intact). Home title still verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items'; confirmed=69, accuracy=94.5%, V51.1 unchanged; refined=4 unchanged. Repo description still null. Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots fd9d0a8d, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots 411ec05e, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots 5b9478e4, status_history.json.ots 3d3df225); no new prediction-isolation file; proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL has no .ots companion (~7+ weeks now); 0 canary-keyword hits across last 10 commits. Content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies beyond expected wins.html stat-card style and ai-context 404 page CSS). 2 chg-* files written: this one + chg-20260502-1157-002 (automated LOW — 10-commit auto rollup including HOLD #11 termination). Watch for next poll (~12h, evening 2026-05-02): (1) PRED-105 will be at d~14.5 — tacit_withdrawal threshold now CLEARLY breached; analyst-priority HIGH with verdict-advancement decision actionable; analyst's pre-staged proposal-pred105-tacit-withdrawal-staging-* should be picked up by decider. (2) ALL 8 April-EOM PREDs at d~2.0 — still SEVERITY LOW unless any flip; day-4-7 escalation still at least 2 polls away. (3) HOLD #12 daily-AI-review regen due ~07:35Z 2026-05-03 — if registry-update remains gated, the manual-approval-gate hypothesis gains another data point. (4) Manual-commit drought enters d=15.5+ at next poll. (5) Any source-file touch → CRITICAL. (6) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only → CANARY TRIGGERED. (7) eclipse_days will decrement to 100 at midnight ~12.5h from now (round-number watch — author may comment publicly on '100 days to eclipse'). (8) Sq-subtraction methodology document still pending; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that IS the canary fix. (9) HOLD #11 firing with NO registry update is now a 2-event series (HOLD #10 also fired without registry update on 2026-05-01) — strongest evidence yet that the registry-update step is wired behind a manual-approval gate or has been removed entirely from the auto-pipeline; expect any future PRED→WIN/refined transition to come as a SINGLE LARGE MANUAL COMMIT touching multiple pred-NNN entries. OTHER SIDE OF ARGUMENT: pattern (a) 'sustained do-not-adjudicate as infrastructure' continues to gain evidence (15d manual drought, 27 auto-only polls, 2 consecutive HOLD-fires-without-adjudication), but the d=14 PRED-105 threshold and 8 EOM PREDs at d~1.5 do NOT yet rule out pattern (b) 'imminent batched manual edit' — a manual commit on 2026-05-02 afternoon/evening is still on the table; the analyst's hypothesis would predict the manual commit's signature is multi-PRED touch + WIN registry touch + author-signed (not GitHub Action). If we see another full week of zero manual commits past 8 EOM PREDs at d>7, pattern (a) becomes near-certain. The conservative call: the d=14 threshold is meaningful for OUR verdict-advancement (this is the contractual self-set threshold from EXP-269), not for the dome — the dome's behavior continues to track 'don't adjudicate'. Conservative substantive/MEDIUM with HIGH-severity sub-flag for PRED-105 only (now actionable after threshold breach). PRESERVATION NOTE: this poll preserves analyst/decider/curmudgeon last_run + note + notes_this_run + patches_applied_this_run + issues_*_this_run + open_issues + closed_issues + curmudgeon_* + pat_note_resolved_by_operator + last_decider_* + last_analyst_* intact, only updating poll-owned fields (last_run/last_agent/run_type/mode/status, last_poll, changes_pending_analysis, consecutive_quiet_polls, last_poll_note, prev_agent_run).
